name: Cosmo: reviewer watcher de-dupe key skips re-finalize; DB-query monitor lags/replays stale
description: The WS-18 reviewer watcher de-dupes on ${WI}|${Resolved} and skips a re-finalize forever unless the Resolved date is hand-bumped; the DB-query monitor lags authoritative page state and replays stale transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: reviewer automation de-dupes on WI|Resolved and the DB-query monitor can lag authoritative page state, so a re-finalize with the same Resolved date can be skipped or stale transitions replayed. Variants: (1) re-finalize after a Gate-2 bounce with unchanged Resolved date; (2) direct page state differs from the DB-query monitor; (3) stale transition replay after a newer page state. Regression coverage: add/update the relevant watcher/monitor tests so re-finalize triggers review from the actual transition identity without date hacking and stale monitor reads are ignored or reconciled; tests fail without the fix and pass with it.
